summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of REC-003 Recipe Detail Screen. All core functionality verified: navigation from recipe list, metadata display, nutrition card, ingredients/steps lists, library toggle, propose-to-catalog flow, three-dots menu (edit/delete), not-found handling. Verified NO semáforo logic present (code inspection confirmed no compute_recipe_status/compute_library_status calls). All UI text in Spanish, design tokens respected. Wizard→detail navigation verified via code review (RecipeWizardScreen.js line 456).
passed_tests: Recipe detail screen loads with [data-testid=recipe-detail-screen]
Title displays in Playfair Display font [data-testid=recipe-detail-title]
Back link 'Mis Recetas' present top-left [data-testid=recipe-detail-back]
Three-dots menu button present top-right [data-testid=recipe-detail-menu-button]
Metadata chips display correctly: time (optional), difficulty (Spanish: Fácil/Media/Difícil), servings (N raciones)
Nutrition card titled 'Estimación por ración' [data-testid=recipe-nutrition]
Nutrition unavailable state works [data-testid=recipe-nutrition-unavailable]
Ingredients list displays with sort_order, quantity+unit, key markers '· Clave'
Steps list displays as numbered cards with 'Preparación' title
Library toggle works: 'Añadir a mi biblioteca' ↔ 'En mi biblioteca' with toast messages
Propose-to-catalog button present [data-testid=recipe-propose-button] when allowed
Propose confirmation dialog works [data-testid=recipe-confirm-propose]
Three-dots menu opens [data-testid=recipe-options-menu] with edit/delete options
Edit option navigates to /my-recipes/edit/:id showing ComingSoon for non-drafts
Delete confirmation dialog works [data-testid=recipe-confirm-delete]
Not-found screen displays [data-testid=recipe-detail-not-found] for invalid IDs
Not-found back button works [data-testid=recipe-not-found-back]
NO semáforo logic present (verified via code inspection)
All UI text in Spanish
No console errors or page errors
Wizard final-save navigation to /my-recipes/:id (verified via code review line 456)
